rationale: Assessment and first strength session completed today — full rest to absorb that stimulus before week 1 begins.

warmup: 5 min brisk walk or bike; leg swings (front/back, lateral) 10 reps each; hip circles 10 each; bodyweight squat 2×10; squat ramp sets: bar×8, 40 kg×5, 55 kg×3, 65 kg×2
cooldown: 5 min easy walk; seated hamstring stretch 30s each; kneeling hip flexor stretch 30s each; pigeon pose or figure-4 glute stretch 30s each side

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: 72.5 kg — first working weight per baseline

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Start at 60 kg, hip hinge focus, no spinal rounding

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Moderate load, full range, controlled descent

exercises.name: Forearm Plank
exercises.notes: Slight progression from 60s baseline — stop if hips sag

rationale: First structured lower-body session at baseline working weights — squat leads, RDL covers posterior chain without axial deadlift load.

warmup: 5 min easy bike or row; arm circles 15 each direction; band pull-aparts 2×15; scapular wall slides 2×10; bench ramp sets: bar×10, 35 kg×5, 47.5 kg×3
cooldown: 5 min easy walk; doorway chest stretch 30s; cross-body shoulder stretch 30s each; lat stretch (hanging or standing) 30s each side

exercises.name: Face Pulls (cable or band)
exercises.notes: Shoulder prehab — non-negotiable; light load, full retraction

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 55 kg — elbows 45–60° from torso, stop at any shoulder pain

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Start at 20 kg each side; full range, controlled

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Shoulder-width or slightly wider grip, pull to upper chest

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Light load, cable preferred over dumbbells for shoulder safety

rationale: First upper-body session at baseline bench weight with mandatory shoulder prehab and balanced pull volume to protect the rotator cuff.

warmup: 2 easy lengths (50 m) of slow freestyle to loosen up; 30s shoulder rolls and neck circles on pool deck before entering
cooldown: 2 easy lengths backstroke or gentle float; calf stretch on pool steps 30s each; standing hip flexor stretch 30s each side

exercises.name: Continuous Freestyle Swim
exercises.notes: Target avg HR 112–131 bpm; aim to match or exceed 550 m baseline

rationale: Zone 2 aerobic base session — slightly longer than the 20-min baseline to begin building volume toward the VO2 max goal.
Mid-week rest between the swim and the next strength block to allow recovery.

warmup: 5 min bike or walk; leg swings 10 each; hip circles 10 each; band pull-aparts 1×15; deadlift ramp sets: 60 kg×5, 72.5 kg×3, 80 kg×1
cooldown: 5 min easy walk; hamstring stretch 30s each; hip flexor stretch 30s each; lat stretch 30s each side

exercises.name: Barbell Conventional Deadlift
exercises.notes: 85 kg — baseline working weight; brace hard, neutral spine

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Start at 20 kg each; moderate incline ~30°, elbows tucked in

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: 20 kg each side — same as day 2 to confirm baseline

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Slow and controlled; lower back stays pressed to floor

rationale: Second strength session of the week hits the deadlift (separate from squat day) plus upper-body accessories within shoulder constraints.
End-of-week rest day — 3 training sessions completed this week, full recovery before week 2 begins.
